audience: SME owners, marketers and communications or HR teams considering video for their website, sales, recruitment or brand communications
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's helpen bepalen wanneer een bedrijfsvideo meerwaarde heeft, welk format bij hun doel past en hoe ze productie, gebruik en meting voorbereiden

searchIntent.question: When is a corporate video worth producing, which format fits the objective and how should an SME plan production and distribution?

mainKeyword: why invest in a corporate video
longTailKeywords: how to plan a corporate video
directAnswer: A corporate video is worth producing when movement, voice or sequence explains something better than text and photographs alone. Its value depends on defining the audience question, intended channel, evidence and next step before filming, then delivering versions people will genuinely publish and use.
title: Why invest in a corporate video? A practical guide for SMEs
metaDescription: Learn when a corporate video adds value, which format fits your goal and how to plan its script, production, accessibility, distribution and measurement.
h1: Why invest in a corporate video for your SME?
factsToPreserve: Video is valuable only when purpose, audience and distribution are defined
There is no universally ideal video length
Google does not guarantee video indexing, video features, rich results or rankings
Recognisable people and third-party creative assets require appropriate permissions and rights
The example Bouw Realisaties is a real VisualVibe production
A smaller production can succeed by reducing complexity rather than preparation, audio quality or essential rights
